full_text:
Guan Yi 關彝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Yi (關彝). Son of Guan Xing by concubine. Died fighting Wei troops during Zhong Hui’s rebellion. Guan Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Guan Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
